headerDisplay: Homebridge plugin to control a Sleep Number SleepIQ bed and foundation. All accessories are auto-detected from your account.
footerDisplay: For help or to report issues, visit the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/dppeak/homebridge-sleepiq).

email.title: Email
email.description: Your Sleep Number account email address.

refreshTime.title: Refresh Time (seconds)
refreshTime.description: How often to poll SleepIQ for updates. Increase to reduce API requests. There is little benefit setting this below 5 seconds as the SleepIQ API does not update faster than that.

sendDelay.title: Send Delay (seconds)
sendDelay.description: Debounce delay before sending a new sleep number to the bed after adjusting the slider in HomeKit. Increase if the bed receives too many rapid requests while dragging.

warmingTimer.title: Foot Warming Timer
warmingTimer.description: How long the foot warmer runs when turned on. Recommended: leave at 6 hours and use HomeKit automations to turn it off earlier if needed.
